subject: Re: Question about the exported image series
body:
Hi Yunjie,
Particles exported from WarpTools in Warp 2.0 are CTF pre-multiplied. I’m not sure about the previous versions
Cheers,
Alister
Sent from mobile - apologies for brevity
On Jun 11, 2024, at 23:09, Yunjie Chang <changyj0821@gmail.com> wrote:
﻿Hi everyone,
For cryo-ET particles, Warp can export sub-tomograms or image series. As I know, the sub-tomograms are ctf corrected.
My question is, if I export image series, are the image series ctf-corrected or not?
Thanks
Yunjie
